name: kuzushi-security-plugin
description: Autonomous, language-aware local security review pipeline for Claude Code: context, x-ray, PASTA threat model, CVE threat-intel, invariant testing, adversarial threat-hunting, memory-corruption exploitability assessment, fuzz proof, and PoC⁺ patch validation — wiring conditional LSP/MCP tooling (tree-sitter, semgrep, CodeQL, Joern) behind a hardened tool-boundary policy. Operates on source you have on disk, with no live target, proxy, or traffic capture. Self-contained, no external engine.
